policy: AI Tutor Alpha requires backend proxy, guardrails, server-side rate limits, structured logs, and credential-gated frontend calls.

checks.label: Backend proxy exists without frontend AI key
checks.detail: AI provider key must stay in Supabase Edge Function env only.

checks.label: Socratic guardrails block answer leakage
checks.detail: Tutor must block copy-paste / answer-only bypass prompts.

checks.label: Server-side rate limit exists
checks.detail: Edge Function must rate-limit requests before model calls.

checks.label: Structured tutor logs exist
checks.detail: Logs must cover response, guardrail and rate-limit events without raw message logging.

checks.label: UI calls production only with real sync credentials
checks.detail: Frontend must fall back locally when credentials are unavailable.

checks.label: Production Alpha note is visible
checks.detail: Learner-facing UI must explain backend-backed alpha and fallback.

checks.label: AI Tutor Alpha policy exists
checks.detail: AI_TUTOR_ALPHA_POLICY.md must document backend, guardrails, rate limits and logs.
